My place looked spotless after they were done, and it honestly felt like a weight off my shoulders. It’s nice having a cleaning service I can count on, and I’ll definitely be using them again.

name: Jonathan Weiselberg
description: I couldn’t be happier with the service! The team was professional, thorough, and incredibly detail-oriented. They didn’t just do the basics — every corner was spotless, and my home felt fresh and welcoming afterwards. Scheduling was simple, communication was clear, and they showed up right on time. It’s obvious they take pride in their work, and it really shows in the results. I would highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable, top-quality cleaning!

name: Tia Holloway
description:
I recently hired Polished Pro Cleaners to handle a deep clean for my home, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. From the moment I reached out, their customer service was professional, responsive, and easy to work with.

The cleaning team arrived on time, came fully prepared with supplies, and immediately got to work. They paid attention to detail in every room—dusting areas I usually overlook, scrubbing baseboards, and leaving my floors spotless. Even the little touches, like neatly organizing items and making sure everything smelled fresh, really stood out.

What impressed me most was their efficiency and thoroughness. They managed to complete the job faster than I expected without cutting corners. The pricing was fair, especially considering the quality of work.

I highly recommend Polished Pro Cleaners to anyone looking for reliable, detail-oriented cleaning services. I’ll definitely be booking them again!

name: Maria Camila Arevalo Galeano
description: The service was efficient. They arrived on time and took care of every detail I mentioned. I will keep calling them monthly.

name: Chad Ward
description: Polished pro cleaners has remarkable service. Very punctual and gets the job done. Service is reliable and of great quality.

description: Top Tier cleaning. Very efficient and neat.  Easy to communicate with regarding preferences and specifics, great pricing. Overall a worthwhile company to work with!
